tests.observed_ui: Access Denied card: 'You do not have permission to access the admin dashboard.' Sidebar shows only Dashboard + Settings (no admin menus).
tests.note: RBAC correctly blocks EMPLOYEE from /admin. No admin UI exposed.

tests.observed_ui: Redirected back to /me/dashboard (no approvals/inbox view rendered for EMPLOYEE).
tests.note: Next.js route returned HTTP 503 on /approvals/inbox document request, then redirect to /me/dashboard. 503 indicates server/middleware error rather than clean 403 or redirect. Expected: clean redirect OR empty-state 'No approvals for your role'.

tests.observed_ui: Profile shell + sidebar (HOME, MY SPACE, PEOPLE nav groups) renders. Content area shows skeleton loaders (profile data fetch slow).
tests.note: Page authorizes correctly. Header briefly shows placeholder 'User / Employee' instead of 'Saran V / EMPLOYEE' — likely auth context race, resolves on subsequent nav.

tests.observed_ui: Breadcrumb 'Home > My Dashboard'. 4 stat-card skeletons + 2 detail-panel skeletons render. Sidebar MY SPACE active.
tests.note: Dashboard shell and sidebar render cleanly for EMPLOYEE. Skeleton state persists long but no API failures observed in this shard.

s8_helpdesk.observed_ui: Access Denied page with lock icon: 'You don't have permission to access this page.' + 'Go to Home' button.
s8_helpdesk.note: EMPLOYEE cannot view own helpdesk tickets — RBAC too restrictive. Per NU-AURA spec, 'Every User Is an Employee' and self-service tickets should be accessible (HELPDESK:VIEW_OWN or equivalent). Also GET /helpdesk returned 503 (same route-handler/middleware class of issue as BUG-W6-001).

bugs.title: Approvals inbox returns 503 for EMPLOYEE before redirect
EMPLOYEE denied access to own helpdesk tickets (self-service broken)
bugs.evidence: Access Denied UI for saran@nulogic.io (EMPLOYEE role); GET /helpdesk returned 503
